title: Resolved QA issues without content loss
changes: Retained all 470 original item IDs and added 6 verified missing coverage/mirror records.
Resolved date_quality=unknown records by adding auditable archive-first-seen timeline dates without fabricating publication dates.
Generated 367 local metadata preview images so no item uses thumbnail_mode=fallback.
Resolved all 8 duplicate clusters losslessly via canonical URL-variant normalization and provenance flags; no item was deleted.
Preserved the five families with status needs_review exactly as requested.
Regenerated QA, provenance chains, duplicate resolution, lossless audit and external verification reports.
warnings: Archive-first-seen dates are monitoring dates, not claimed publication dates.
Generated previews are local metadata previews, not scraped platform screenshots.

title: Provenance chain and data governance upgrade
changes: Added provenance.schema_version v1 object to all 470 items.
Added role, relationship, evidence_urls, confidence and review_status fields for every item.
Generated provenance_chains.json with family role counts and duplicate chains.
Backfilled discovery metadata for items itm_00451 through itm_00470.
Recomputed qa_report.json and diff_report.json.
Updated HTML app to v74 with Data Quality and Provenance sections.
recommended_next_step: v75 Admin mode: editable metadata, validation flags, CSV/JSON export and patch application.

title: Review-first AI Tools MVP artefacts
changes: Added candidate_queue.json as the review-first intake layer.
Added duplicate_candidates.json for merge/mirror review.
Added schema files for items, sources, families, candidates and provenance.
Added scripts/generate_qa_report.mjs to regenerate QA metrics from JSON data.
No browser API-key pattern added; AI integration remains server-side by design.
security_principles: No direct AI write into items.json.
Candidates require review_status transition before export patch.
Server-side API keys only; browser bundle remains static.

title: Added Flow Lego and CNN IRAN LEGO YouTube channels
changes: Added @flowlego as verified YouTube primary creator/source
Added @CNNIRANLEGO as YouTube candidate source pending verification
Added channel and videos-tab records for both channels
Updated embedded HTML snapshot and JSON data files

summary: v66 expanded source taxonomy, added candidate accounts, and added recent coverage/mirror/source-page items.
notes: Added primary_distribution, official_social, platform_removed, amplifier, coverage_* and needs_verification source kinds.
Added recent coverage from Al Jazeera, WIRED, The Verge, The National, Al-Monitor, ABC, Forbes, Le Monde, Salon, Jerusalem Post and related source pages/mirrors.
Account URLs marked needs_verification should be manually confirmed because handles and platform availability can change quickly.
Coverage and mirrors are clearly separated from primary sources.

summary: Migrated the current project into a dataset-driven v2 library and generated a fresh HTML output.
notes: Current HTML was converted into items.json, sources.json and source_families.json.
The v2 output keeps the source registry, QA dashboard, latest additions, alerts and changelog.

title: Clean interface and source registry layout
changes: Kept the homepage What’s New overview visible
Moved technical update/status history out of the main interface
Added a dedicated source registry layout with summary counts
Added source search, platform/type filters, and reliability quick filters
Created data/changelog_v71.json for technical changelog notes
Kept Check now and Import JSON functional but less prominent

title: Interface cleanup
changes: Removed visible v69 homepage implementation note from the interface
Moved technical update notes to changelog files
Simplified top-left branding to 🇮🇷 Iran Lego Movies
Kept What’s New visible on the homepage
Kept the dedicated source registry layout functional
Removed macOS/localhost/file-mode instructions from the visible interface and kept them in README
moved_from_interface: v69 homepage: Grotere contentrails, minder tekst op cards en automatische leader-rotatie met thematische achtergronden.
Technische updategeschiedenis staat nu in data/changelog_v71.json. Het compacte What’s New-overzicht blijft bovenaan de hoofdpagina.
